candidate_summary: Maltese Ggantija megalithic temple architecture mapped to LLM memory: 5 apsidal alcoves as K=5 specialty side-memory banks, corbelled stepped vault as K-tier compressed-gist hierarchy with shrink factor q approx 0.6, trilithon doorways as binary gates, and orthostats as eviction-immune pinned KV anchors along a solstice-aligned central retrieval axis.
content_words: corbel geometric stepped K-tier compressed-gist hierarchy
trilithon doorway binary gate apse-specialty signature
orthostat anchor KV pinned eviction-immune load-bearing
corbelled stone course false vault stepped

results.name: PagedEviction Block-wise KV Pruning
results.rationale: Block-wise KV pruning shares the KV-cache management domain but lacks any apse-branching, corbel-tier shrink, trilithon gating, or pinned-anchor structure.

results.name: StreamingLLM Attention Sinks
results.rationale: Attention sinks act as eviction-immune anchor tokens, closely matching the orthostat-anchor sub-mechanism but missing the 5-apse branching, corbel tiering, and trilithon gates.

results.name: SAGE-KV Self-Attention Guided Eviction
results.rationale: Self-attention-guided eviction is a single-tier pruning policy with no specialty branches, hierarchical shrink-factor tiers, or pinned load-bearing anchors.

results.name: MemGPT-style Tiered Memory Agents
results.rationale: Tiered agent memory parallels the corbel K-tier compressed-gist hierarchy but omits the K=5 apse-specialty branching, trilithon binary gates, and orthostat pinned anchors as a unified scheme.

results.name: Multi-Tier Dynamic Storage KV Cache
results.rationale: Multi-tier dynamic KV storage closely matches the corbel stepped K-tier with shrink factor q approx 0.6, crossing both semantic and functional thresholds despite missing apse-branching and trilithon gating.

results.name: ChunkKV Semantic-Preserving Compression
results.rationale: Chunk-level semantic-preserving compression overlaps with gist compression but lacks the K=5 specialty branching, hierarchical course-shrink tiers, gating, and pinned anchors.

results.name: KV Cache Compression 2026 Survey
results.rationale: Survey covers compression and tiering broadly but does not articulate the specific 5-branch + stepped-shrink + binary-gate + pinned-anchor combination as a unified architecture.

results.name: LMCache Tiered KV Cache
results.rationale: LMCache implements multi-tier KV caching matching corbel tiering but lacks specialty apse-branch routing, explicit trilithon gates, and orthostat pinned anchors.

decision_rationale: Only one of eight results crosses any hit threshold; primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.88 / func 0.74-0.88 on tiered-KV + attention-sink adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
